Title: Unplanned maintenance on generator due to conveyor roller issues
What happened?: Conveyor roller bearing failed causing unplanned shutdown of production line 2
Obj. Evidence: Roller bearing inspection report dated 2022-12-11 showing metal fatigue
Root Cause: Inadequate lubrication schedule for high-load bearing components
Analysis: Failure analysis revealed insufficient lubrication intervals for bearings under continuous high-load operation
Action Plan: Implement revised lubrication schedule and replace all conveyor roller bearings in production line 2
Recom.Action: Monthly lubrication instead of quarterly, bearing replacement every 6 months
Root Cause Tail Extraction: Inadequate lubrication schedule for high-load bearing components

Title: Emergency shutdown procedure improvement following safety incident
What happened?: Emergency shutdown system delayed response during safety incident drill
Obj. Evidence: Emergency response drill report showing 45-second delay in shutdown activation
Requirement: Emergency response time must be under 30 seconds per safety regulations
Root Cause: Outdated emergency shutdown control system with slow response time
Analysis: Control system analysis revealed communication delays between safety sensors and shutdown valves
Action Plan: Upgrade emergency shutdown control system with modern high-speed controllers
Recom.Action: Install new emergency shutdown system with fiber optic communication
Root Cause Tail Extraction: Outdated emergency shutdown control system with slow response time

Title: NEW RECORD - Compressor vibration analysis and corrective action
What happened?: Air compressor showing abnormal vibration patterns during operation
Obj. Evidence: Vibration analysis report showing frequencies outside normal operating range
Requirement: Equipment reliability standards require vibration levels within specification
Analysis: Foundation inspection revealed 2mm settlement on east side causing shaft misalignment
Action Plan: Re-level compressor foundation and perform shaft alignment
Recom.Action: Install vibration monitoring system for continuous tracking
